## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] math — AMM math changes
- [ ] contract — smart contract changes
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — tooling / dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [conventional format](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)
- [ ] PR targets the **develop** branch
